name: 808 - Firetower12
short_description: You are Max. A 17 year old that has just graduated from school. Your mother want's you to get a job. You search endlessely but the luck just isn't on your side. Until one day. You have been accepted as a Fire lookout. A week later, you head out.
detailed_description:
Description

A short - middle length Firewatch horror game with a retro vhs style and a branching narrative. You can have different conversations with characters and choose your response. Some choices have consequences... others don't. The game's story is relatively simple.

The Story

You (Max) have finished school and want to get a job. Unfortunately, you're just out of luck, and nobody accepts you. you go crazy trying to find a job and your mom is threatning you to kick you out of the house. But that stops until one fateful day. Your parents are out of the house and your sister isn't home. You wake up from your nap and go to your computer. You slowly check each e-mail only to find that you've been accepted as a fire lookout. After getting some food, you begin your journey to your new home. After the first day, you realize something’s off...

Gameplay

The game is a first - person story game where you can interact and play the story of "Max".

You can walk (wasd) and interact with different objects (Left mouse button)

You can also eat and drive.

Key things

  • Playtime ~ 2h

  • Vhs / Retro Style

  • Branching narrative / make your own choices

  • Not everything has a consequence

  • Phone texting mechanic with different response options

  • Driving mechanic

  • eating mechanic
